comparison_label: IPF lung versus healthy lung across the discovery bulk-transcriptomic cohorts
inclusion_rule_summary: Use only the 11 lung GEO datasets explicitly disclosed in the TNIK IPF paper as discovery-time inputs.
exclusion_rule_summary: Do not mix blood datasets or the GSE136831 scRNA-seq follow-up into this contrast.
leakage_risks: Do not use downstream clinical-trial evidence as a discovery-time label.
Do not merge blood and lung tissue into a single contrast without an explicit heterogeneity model.

provenance.notes: The accession list is explicit in the paper, but per-dataset sample counts remain to be recovered.
